Localization.Description: Possible exploitation of the CVE-2022-33679 vulnerability in Kerberos, which will allow attackers to obtain an authenticated session on behalf of the victim and execute arbitrary code on a compromised node. This may allow an attacker to extract the credentials of other users and move horizontally to other infrastructure nodes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible exploitation of vulnerability CVE-2022-33679 in Kerberos on domain controller {event_src.host} is detected. An attempt was made from host {src.host} to recover the session key of the user {subject.account.name} to gain access to the service {logon_service}.
